assembly_info.comments:
We perform genome sequencing of the important 100 eukaryotic microorganisms for the promotion of various studies. Genome sequenced microbial strains and genome DNA are available from RIKEN BRC-JCM.
http://www.jcm.riken.jp/cgi-bin/jcm/jcm_number?JCM=2005 Japan Collection of Microorganisms, RIKEN BioResource Center, 3-1-1 Koyadai, Tsukuba, Ibaraki 305-0074, Japan
